name: Weblink International Inc.
summary: Weblink International, Inc. owns and operates stores that sell software and information technology products in Taiwan. Its stores offer commercial and home information electronics, application software products, digital entertainment products, system integration, lifestyle products, SMBs solution services etc. It also sells products online. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan. Weblink International, Inc. is a subsidiary of Acer Incorporated.
